mano_cua.result_summary: AutosizeTextarea组件功能完全正常。成功导航到/docs/autosize-textarea页面，textarea正常渲染，点击后获得焦点(蓝色边框高亮)，输入'Hello World'正常显示，输入10行文字后textarea高度自动从52px最小高度扩展以容纳全部内容，无滚动条。控制台无组件相关JS错误(仅有外部广告资源403和buymeacoffee图片警告，与组件无关)
mano_cua.last_reasoning: AutosizeTextarea component works correctly. Successfully navigated to /docs/autosize-textarea, textarea rendered properly, focus works (blue border), text input works, multiline auto-resize works (expanded from 52px min to accommodate 10 lines).
